summary: Comprehensive testing of new admin panel features for Lefteria FC. Backend: 42/42 tests passed (34 existing + 8 new). Frontend: All features working correctly including standalone admin CMS layout, Live Score tab, and Recalculate standings button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working. Admin panel now has standalone CMS layout (no public nav/footer). Live Score tab allows inline score editing and status changes (Scheduled -> Live -> Completed). Standings auto-update when fixtures complete. Recalculate button rebuilds standings from completed fixtures.

admin_standalone_layout.admin_login_page: No navigation bar or footer - PASS
admin_standalone_layout.admin_panel: No navigation bar or footer - PASS
admin_standalone_layout.admin_header: Custom header with 'LEFTERIA FC CMS' branding and logout button - PASS
admin_standalone_layout.admin_sidebar: 12 tabs present (Πίνακας, Live Score, Σύλλογος, Παίκτες, Ακαδημία, Staff, Αγώνες, Βαθμολογία, Νέα, Γήπεδα, Σεζόν, Μηνύματα) - PASS

live_score_tab.scheduled_fixtures_display: Shows scheduled and live fixtures with inline score inputs - PASS
live_score_tab.start_live_button: 'Έναρξη Live' button sets fixture status to Live - PASS
live_score_tab.end_match_button: 'Τέλος Αγώνα' button sets fixture status to Completed - PASS
live_score_tab.inline_score_editing: Number inputs for home/away scores work correctly - PASS
live_score_tab.auto_update_standings: Standings auto-update when fixture transitions to Completed - PASS

standings_recalculate.recalculate_button: 'Επανυπολογισμός' button present in Standings tab - PASS

dashboard_stat_cards.clickable_cards: Stat cards navigate to corresponding tabs - PASS

api_endpoints.PUT /api/admin/fixtures/{id}/live-score: Quick score updates and status changes - PASS
api_endpoints.POST /api/admin/standings/recalculate: Drops and rebuilds standings from completed fixtures - PASS
api_endpoints.auto_update_standings_for_match: Auto-updates standings when fixture completes - PASS
api_endpoints.reverse_standings_for_match: Reverses old result when scores change on completed fixture - PASS
